title: How to Dry Brush Your Body: Step-by-Step Guide
meta_description: Learn exactly how to dry brush your body the right way — technique, direction, frequency, and benefits. A complete beginner's guide from Real Skin Care.
image_prompt: Lifestyle photography, bright spa-like bathroom setting showing a long-handled natural dry body brush resting across a neatly folded stack of white cotton towels on a freestanding soaking tub ledge, with a second smaller hand-held dry brush laid beside it, both brushes displaying natural bristles and light wood or bamboo handles, a small white ceramic dish holding an unwrapped round white puck-shaped bar soap placed nearby as a secondary element, hex tile floor and white shiplap or subway tile wall visible in the background, warm soft natural window light pouring in from the upper left casting gentle shadows across the brushes and towel stack, the scene immediately reads as a dry brushing ritual in a calm home bathroom environment, photorealistic, 35mm lens, shot on Canon R5, wide landscape crop filling the full frame edge to edge, no letterboxing, no borders.
